query: Real-time member chat for Memberstack and Webflow sites alternative

results.title: Midway Chat: Real-time member chat for Memberstack and Webflow sites
results.content:
, Circle (another login), or wiring up a chat API like TalkJS. Midway is one iframe embed. Paste it into Webflow, point it at your Memberstack project, and your members get DMs with voice notes, replies, reactions, typing indicators, read receipts, online presence, and chat-request gating so nobody gets spammed. There are other ways to put chat on a site (TalkJS, Stream, Memberchat in the Memberstack ecosystem). Midway's tradeoff is being built specifically around Memberstack auth and Webflow embedding, so the setup is minutes instead of days, and your site stays the home of the community instead of pointing people to a third-party app. Free plan to try, paid plans when you scale past a couple hundred MAU.

Upvote (2)

Report

Share

1d ago

Image 13: Ansari Adin

Ansari Adin [...] Presence specifically is handled with a lightweight heartbeat into our own database rather than holding a presence slot per active user in the realtime backend, materially cheaper at scale and it survives reloads and it gives the same green-dot UX.

On pricing, Midway is flat MAU-based, not connection-based, with plans at 50 / 500 / 2500 MAU for now across Free, Starter, and Studio. Realtime cost is our problem to solve, not the customer's: the tiers are sized so a heavily active community still fits comfortably inside our realtime cost structure.

TalkJS makes it easy to bring real-time chat into your Webflow site with Memberstack. Create private messages, group chats, or community spaces—all fully customizable to fit your brand and design.

results.title: Memberstack Alternatives: Which Tool is the Right Fit for Your Webflow Agency? | Slam Media Lab
results.content:
## FAQs

What are the best Memberstack alternatives?

The best Memberstack alternatives for Webflow sites are Outseta (all-in-one CRM + auth + billing), Wized (logic builder), Webflow Logic (native, beta), and Memberspace—each offers a different tradeoff between setup simplicity, feature depth, and monthly cost.

When should you consider a Memberstack alternative?

Consider alternatives when you need CRM functionality alongside memberships (use Outseta), want lower transaction fees, need more complex gating logic, or are building a SaaS app with requirements that exceed Memberstack's member-management scope.

How does Outseta compare to Memberstack? [...] In this section, we’ll also take a closer look at two additional WordPress plugin alternatives to Memberstack:

1. Membermouse
2. Restrict Content Pro

Before selecting a WordPress plugin, it’s a good idea to consider your specific requirements, budget, and integration needs. You should also check for the latest updates and reviews to ensure the plugin is compatible with your WordPress setup.

### Membermouse

Membermouse is a WordPress plugin with enterprise-level features. It features the option to create everything from unlimited membership plans to digital downloads and physical product purchases. [...] ## Memberstack Alternatives: WordPress Plugins

If you’re using a WordPress site, you have several plugin options for setting up your membership authentication.

WordPress plugins are third-party software components you can install to extend the functionality of your WordPress site. These add-ons are easily integrated into a WordPress site to improve functionality or add new capabilities without altering the core code.

Users can install, activate, and deactivate plugins as needed, making them a flexible and highly customizable option for WordPress websites

The two most popular WordPress plugins are:

1. BuddyBoss – an app geared towards online learning and community building.
2. Ultimate Member – great for user-centric sign-up solutions.

### Related topics [...] # Memberstack alternatives for membership integration into Webflow Website

I’ve started and completed integration of Membestack into our Webflow website. I choose Memberstack without considering other options just because there is lots of documentation and tutorials on integrating Memberstack with Webflow. However, 2 huge deal breakers came out:

Connecting Webflow with Mememberstack looks like a dream on Youtube tutorials - easy, simple, trustworthy. Maybe it’s good to play around or build MVP to showcase or something, but in real life situation, for the websites that are built to be marketed heavily via pay-per-click ads and so on - this is not good solution due to incompleteness.

results.title: The 10 Best Webflow Integrations You Can Clone For Free! | Memberstack
results.content:
PureVPN are just one of the companies who are actively using Intercom. Users no longer have to talk to an AI, they can chat instantly to a real person.

Blog image

### Jetboost

Jetboost is a nifty tool specially made for Webflow projects. At its core, its a search filtering tool that supports on-page, real-time search. Without writing a single line of code, developers can implement dynamic filtering, sorting and advanced pagination. This is especially useful for content-heavy websites that posts regular articles. Jetboost offers different payment plans, so whether you’re building a Saas product or tinkering with a side project - there’s an option for you. Check out their pricing page here: [...] ### Intercom

So you’ve got MailChimp set up on your Webflow project, but what if a website visitor has a specific question? Filling in a contact form might not be convenient for some people. Thats where the Webflow & Intercom Acquire integration comes in. Intercom helps you capture and convert leads into customers using real-time chat. Developers can easily write answers to FAQ’s, meaning they don’t have to build an entire FAQ page. Business owners and support teams also save time by not having to manage multiple different emails.

Blog image

Simply copy-and-paste a JavaScript code snippet from Intercom. To get started with Intercom, refer to Webflow’s 3 minute tutorial on their Youtube channel:
